llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 10.1 (Approval of the Revised Measure S Implementation Plan - Partial Implementation) was pulled from the agenda to allow additional time for review and refinement.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Would someone like to move that we approve the consent agenda? So I'll second. All those in favor? Aye.
